title: Adidas India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Adidas India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Adidas India! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Adidas India:
Adidas India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India!
